scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @ish/design-overlay build && pnpm --filter @ish/sandbox build && pnpm --filter portfolio dev
scripts.dev:watch: pnpm --filter @ish/design-overlay build && pnpm --filter @ish/sandbox build && concurrently -n overlay,sandbox,portfolio "pnpm --filter @ish/design-overlay build:watch" "pnpm --filter @ish/sandbox build:watch" "pnpm --filter portfolio dev"
scripts.format: pnpm -r format && pnpm exec oxfmt github-pages-redirect
scripts.format-check: pnpm -r --parallel format-check && pnpm exec oxfmt --check github-pages-redirect
